skills.name: google-drive-management
skills.description: Manages Google Drive files and folders through the Drive API

skills.name: notion-management
skills.description: Manages Notion pages and databases through the Notion API

skills.name: frontend-styling
skills.description: Designs the frontend for DriveSense, a file hygiene extension that watches, detects, and surfaces file organization suggestions. The UI must be calm, precise, and trustworthy, with three surfaces: an extension popup (360px wide), content overlay (injected inline), and settings page (max 640px). The aesthetic is Refined Utilitarian with warm neutrals, a sage/amber palette, and considered typography (Fraunces / Plus Jakarta Sans / IBM Plex Mono).
